markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.0021 — Rules and Forms

(a) The department may adopt rules to administer this chapter.

(b) The department shall post forms on the Internet and provide each county assessor-collector with a sufficient supply of any necessary forms on request.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 72, eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department may adopt rules to administer this chapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The department shall post forms on the Internet and provide each county assessor-collector with a sufficient supply of any necessary forms on request.
